description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a pages job that runs in the default stage, executes the shell commands "yarn install" and "./node_modules/.bin/gatsby build --prefix-paths", and publishes the resulting public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. Configure the job to run only on the master branch. No additional stages, services, or variables are required.
